comment.body:
ES rallied 58 points after Alma entered her trade today. She said she was only risking half of yesterday’s profits. The max amount she could have made yesterday was 48 points if she timed it perfectly. So her stop loss was 24 points today, or 5466. ES rallied to 4999.75. She should’ve been stopped out for a loss.

Just keeping things honest.

comment.body: I think he was attacked because that person was only pointing out the negative and got nothing positive to say, despite a positive outcome. As for the trade this morning, it all comes down to position sizing. That move was made intentionally to stop people out, so if you had your stops at an obvious spot then getting stopped out couldnt be avoided. Try to size smaller and give more room for your stops
